_note: Forward FOMC schedule (events: meetings, speeches, testimony, statistical releases). Recorded once per the u43 fixture procedure; tests replay this body via httpx.MockTransport (R10). Re-record only when the live shape changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. The endpoint is unauthenticated, so no API key appears in the URL or body. The byte-equal contract is enforced by sha256 below.
